pi_items.source: Direct HTTP request verification using curl; confirmed landing page is Wikipedia language portal at www.wikipedia.org
URL domain parsing from https://www.wikipedia.org; domain contains 'wikipedia.org' in netloc
HTML <title> tag content extracted via curl: <title>Wikipedia</title>. OpenGraph metadata (og:title) also references 'Wikipedia'

privileged_info_summary: The task targets https://www.wikipedia.org, which is Wikipedia's language portal page. The page's HTML title tag is exactly 'Wikipedia', matching the expected_bookmark_title_pattern. The URL domain 'wikipedia.org' matches the expected_bookmark_url_pattern. All three metadata claims are factually correct and point to real, publicly accessible Wikipedia infrastructure.
